title: Longshot (disambiguation)
content:
'''Longshot''' or '''Long Shot''' may refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Longshot]]''', a [[clone trooper]]
*The ''Longshot'', a false identity used by the '''''[[Millennium Falcon]]'''''

==Legends==
*'''[[Longshot/Legends|Longshot]]''', a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] who served on the [[Battle of Lola Sayu/Legends|mission to the Citadel]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]
*The ''Longshot'', a false identity given to the '''''[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|Millennium Falcon]]''''' by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]
*The '''''[[Longshot (Dreadnaught-class)|Longshot]]''''', a [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] owned and operated by [[Dunari]]
*The '''''[[Longshot (Tri-Mark VII Interceptor)|Longshot]]''''', a [[Tri-Mark VII Interceptor]] used by [[Meeko Ghintee]]
*The '''''[[Long Shot]]''''', a modified [[GX1 short hauler/Legends|GX1 Short Hauler]] used by [[Ixsthmus]]
*The '''''[[Menagerie]]''''', a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] ship formerly known as ''Long Shot''

{{Disambig}}
